title: Genshin Craft
description: This mod is dedicated to realizing Genshin Impact in Minecraft
body:
## Introduction
* Let you experiance Genshin Impact in minecraft.
* This mod implements the system of Genshin Impact, such as element damage, element infusion, element reaction, etc.
## Implemented features
* **Entity health bar**
   * Added a health bar on top of all living entity.
* **Damage number**
   * When an living entity receives damage, the damage number will be displayed.
* **Elemental infusion**
   * You can use elements to infusion an item, and the item will cause elemental damage to living 
* **Elemental reaction**
   * All types of elemental reactions have been achieved.
* **Character skills**
   * Implemented skills for some characters.
* **Artifacts**
   * Equip artifacts to enhance combat effectiveness.
## Game mechanism modification
* **Increased the maximum health of all living entities.**
* **Increased damage caused by all entities.**
* **Increased environmental damage.**
* **Modified some damage mechanisms.**
